witnesses.description: A satisfying assignment for p and q.

checks.claim: The assignment p = true, q = true satisfies p and q.
checks.notes: The validator evaluates p and q under the listed assignment.

checks.claim: There exists a Boolean assignment falsifying p or not p.
checks.notes: The validator enumerates the two assignments and finds no excluded-middle counterexample.

checks.claim: There exists a Boolean assignment satisfying p and not p.
checks.notes: The validator enumerates the two assignments and finds no satisfying contradiction.

checks.claim: There exists a Boolean assignment separating not (p and q) from (not p) or (not q).
checks.notes: The validator enumerates all four assignments and finds no De Morgan counterexample.

checks.claim: There exists a Boolean assignment satisfying (p) and (not p or q) and (not q).
checks.notes: The validator enumerates all four assignments and finds no satisfying CNF row.
